response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable polyglot engineer with a long career spanning distributed systems, full-stack development, and open-source tooling. However, the Principal Growth / Experimentation Systems role requires deep, specialized experience in A/B testing infrastructure, telemetry pipelines, feature flagging, rollout risk management, and statistical analysis — none of which appear anywhere in the resume. His most relevant work (high-throughput services at Dunnhumby) shows distributed systems competence but not at the experimentation platform level. His current trajectory is senior/staff full-stack, not Principal IC6 growth systems leadership, and there is no evidence of cross-team technical influence at the scope the role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot proficiency covering TypeScript, C, C++, Java, and DLang — satisfying most of the required language list
Demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/s, low-latency async I/O)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq, showing awareness of modern agentic development paradigms
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis work mentioned across 17 years of employment
Titles remain Senior/Staff individual contributor with no evidence of Principal-level cross-team architectural leadership or growth engineering ownership

key_factors.factor: Seniority and scope gap vs. IC6
